heading: Supervision and maintenance of Old Senate Chamber
label: 2103 Supervision and maintenance of Old Senate Chamber
text: The Commission shall have responsibility for the supervision and maintenance of the Old Senate Chamber on the principal floor of the Senate wing of the Capitol and of the Old Supreme Court Chamber insofar as each is to be preserved as a patriotic shrine in the Capitol for the benefit of the people of the United States.
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 188b–2 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002Section is based on section 3 of Senate Resolution No. 382, Ninetieth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Oct. 1, 1968Pub. L. 100–696
Amendments2001— substituted “and of the Old Supreme Court Chamber insofar as each” for “insofar as it”.Pub. L. 107–68
